title: 1 Little-Known Company Leading the Way in Application Security to Buy Now
text: Synopsys is a chip design software company, but it's also the leader in application security.

title: 3 Top Tech Stocks With Impressive Growth Trajectories
text: 2022 was anything but fun for tech stocks, with a hawkish Federal Reserve weighing heavily on sentiment within the sector all year. Still, despite the headwinds, the outlook for all three of these companies has recently turned bright.
